title:
Datability - November 2018 issue available
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## Datability - November 2018 issue available
The latest issue of Datability , Stats NZ's quarterly newsletter, is now available.
Stats NZ General Manager Rachael Milicich updates you on:
- Data Summit’18 – it’s a wrap
- Algorithm report released
- Public lecture on 5 December in Auckland (co-sponsored by Stats NZ)
- Public consultation : have your say
- Data Roadmap : setting the direction for NZ’s data.
You can subscribe to Datability by visiting stats.govt.nz .
Please email your feedback, suggestions, or questions, to datalead.govt.nz .
